name: M Faisal Kahfi
intro: As a Senior Full-Stack Developer & Team Lead with over a decade of experience (since 2016) in building scalable software architecture and leading engineering teams. Proven track record in pioneering retail automation and digital payment ecosystems, notably driving the technical execution for the first drive-thru self-service application in Indonesia with in-app self-payment. Adept at managing and securing enterprise Android POS systems deployed across 350+ stores, as well as architecting complex third-party middleware integrations (e.g., GoFood & GrabFood).
